speaker: menschik
text: can be muted by COVID-19 vaccine reports contributing substantially to the comparator group, particularly if both mRNA COVID-19 vaccines are associated with the same adverse event.
context: Menschik's September 2021 draft language for a CDC manuscript explained that disproportionality scores can be muted by the volume of COVID-19 vaccine reports.
emphasis_words: can be muted by COVID-19 vaccine reports contributing substantially to the comparator group, particularly if both mRNA COVID-19 vaccines are associated with the same adverse event.
